verdict: Buy XEQT.TO at $45.46 CAD. Core is 10.3% vs 40% target — $1,870 to go. Fund first, every deposit.
Cap breaches: CEG, OSS, SOFI. Do not add — shrink by dilution.
Theme concentration at 89.6%. Building XEQT core is the fix.
Skip: MSFT above zone; PLTR above no-chase; SOFI above zone.

warnings: UNDER-DIVERSIFIED: XEQT core is 10.3% vs 40% target (29.7pp below). Prioritize funding core.
